pre_game.message: Hey, I’m J — I’m here hoping to win enough to buy a new car and help out my family; what’s your story and what brought you to the game?

I’m E — just got laid off from my finance job and I’m the sole earner for a family of five with no savings; I need about $5,000 to get us through a month, so I’m here hoping to win and keep my family afloat.
I’m really sorry to hear that, E — that’s tough. I hope you get what you need; I’d be glad to share info or team up if it helps both our chances.
Thanks, J — I appreciate that. Teaming up sounds great; let's share info and watch each other's backs. What’s your plan?
Let's trade honest info and watch how people act, publicly back each other early so we don't get picked off, and if one of us wins we'll make sure you get the $5k—sound good?
Sounds good — I’ll back you early too; let’s keep each other honest and agree on a clear signal so we can trust each other if one of us wins.
Agreed — let’s use a clear public signal: if I back you I’ll stand up and say “I’ve got you”; if you back me, tap the table twice — deal?
Deal — I’ll tap the table twice to back you; if you stand and say “I’ve got you,” I’ll know you’ve got my back.
Sounds good — I’ll stand and say “I’ve got you” when I back you. Appreciate it, E.
Thanks, J — that means a lot; I’ll tap the table twice early to show I’ve got your back too.
Thanks, E — I’ll watch for your two taps and I’ve got your back too.
Thanks, J — I appreciate it; I’ll tap early and keep an eye out for your stand. Let’s stick to the plan.
